display.purpose: Hero and section headlines; tight -0.025em, 1.04 line-height, grad-text on 1-2 key phrases.

label.purpose: Mono uppercase kickers with 26px sun-orange dash prefix.

shadows.name: sun-glow
shadows.purpose: Rest state of primary CTA pills only.

motion.name: reveal
motion.purpose: Scroll-triggered section entrance (opacity + 24px rise); disabled under prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Sun Button
components.description: Primary CTA; gradient pill with warm glow, lifts on hover.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-sun">Book a strategy call <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none"><path d="M3 8h9M8 4l4 4-4 4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-sun { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; padding: 14px 24px; border-radius: 100px; border: none; cursor: pointer; background: linear-gradient(115deg, #FF5247 0%, #FF8A3D 48%, #FFC24B 100%); color: #fff; box-shadow: 0 8px 24px -8px rgba(255,90,60,.55); transition: transform .18s ease, box-shadow .25s ease; } .ds-btn-sun:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 14px 34px -8px rgba(255,90,60,.65); } .ds-btn-sun:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FF8A3D; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action; hairline pill on light surfaces.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; padding: 14px 24px; border-radius: 100px; cursor: pointer; background: none; border: 1px solid rgba(26,21,18,.10); color: #1A1512; transition: transform .18s ease, border-color .2s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #1A1512; transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FF8A3D; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Eyebrow
components.description: Mono uppercase kicker with sun-orange dash; the system's one deliberate label pattern.
components.css: .ds-eyebrow { font-family: 'Space Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 12.5px; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 400; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; color: #4A423B; } .ds-eyebrow::before { content: ''; width: 26px; height: 1px; background: #FF8A3D; display: inline-block; }

components.name: Grad Headline
components.description: Section headline with the sunburst gradient on a key phrase.
components.css: .ds-headline { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 2.5rem; letter-spacing: -0.025em; line-height: 1.04; color: #1A1512; margin: 0; } .ds-grad { background: linear-gradient(115deg, #FF5247 0%, #FF8A3D 48%, #FFC24B 100%); -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; color: transparent; }

components.name: Night Card
components.description: Panel on dark sections; tonal layering, hairline border, no shadow.
components.css: .ds-night-card { background: #1E1815; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.09); border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; color: #F4EEE8; font-family: 'Hanken Grotesk', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; }

narrative.overview: AI precision wrapped in human warmth. The site sells proprietary AI tooling without ever feeling like an AI startup: no purple, no neon, no glassmorphism. Everything glows in a sunrise ramp — coral through orange to gold — over warm paper by day and roasted brown-black by night. The dark sections are the overnight shift where Sol works; the sun gradient is the light left on.
keyCharacteristics: Sunrise gradient (115deg, coral → orange → gold) as the single brand accent
Warm-tinted everything: even blacks and grays lean brown, never cool
Pill buttons that lift 2px on hover with warm glow shadows
Mono eyebrows with a 26px sun-orange dash prefix
In-page product demos as the centerpiece imagery

rules.name: The One Sun Rule
rules.body: The gradient is the only saturated color in the system. No secondary hue, ever. Blue, purple, green appear only inside data-viz status pips.

rules.name: The Warm Black Rule
rules.body: No pure black, no cool gray anywhere. Every neutral carries a brown undertone.

rules.name: The Hand-Set Rule
rules.body: Headline line breaks are set manually. A single word alone on a line is a bug to fix.

rules.name: The Glow-Not-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows are warm sun-tinted glows, never neutral black drop shadows. On dark, separate with lighter surface tones.

dos: Do use the sun gradient for every primary CTA and grad-text on 1–2 headline phrases per section, max
Do hand-balance headline line breaks at every copy change
Do hold WCAG 2.1 AA contrast (4.5:1 body, 3:1 large)
Do give every animation a prefers-reduced-motion alternative
Do use middots (·) as inline separators
donts: Don't look like a generic AI startup: no purple gradients, no neon, no glassmorphism, no sci-fi
Don't look like a cheap local agency: no stock handshake photos, no template clutter
Don't go corporate enterprise: no jargon walls, no stiff gray palettes
Don't be salesy/pushy: no popups, no countdown timers, one conversion path
Don't introduce a second saturated hue
Don't use neutral black drop shadows
Don't use grad-text on body copy or more than ~2 phrases per viewport
